title: Serial killer pore investigation: protocol for analyzing fatigue failure pores in Ti6Al4V
author: Muofhe Tshibalanganda
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yebftan
materials: Save the defect analysis as csv file.

steps.title: Wrap the sample inside a bubble wrap for support
steps.instruction: Wrap the sample inside a bubble wrap for support. Make sure the marked threaded grip is facing up.This is to know which side is up when analysing.

steps.title: Load the sample on a foam (e
steps.instruction: Load the sample on a foam (e.g. florist oasis).

steps.title: The sample was scanned using the...
steps.instruction: The sample was scanned using the scanned using Phoenix V|Tome|X L240 (General Electric Sensing and Inspection Technologies Phoenix X-ray, Wunstorff, Germany) microCT system. %s %s

steps.title: Reconstruction of the 3D data is...
steps.instruction: Reconstruction of the 3D data is done using General Electric Datos 2.2, using specifically beam hardening correction value of 8 - this reduces beam hardening artefacts significantly.

steps.title: Analysis of 3D data is described...
steps.instruction: Analysis of 3D data is described here using Volume Graphics VGSTUDIO MAX 3.2 .

steps.title: Register the sample - use simple...
steps.instruction: Register the sample - use simple registration to turn the sample upright in the software windows.

steps.title: De-noising is done using the filters...
steps.instruction: De-noising is done using the filters Adaptive Gauss with smoothing factor 0. 8, edge threshold=0.1, iteration=1 and create a new volume.

steps.title: Perfom the poroity analysis using Probability...
steps.instruction: Perfom the poroity analysis using Probability 0 minimum voxel 8 Maximum voxel 400 Auto threshold deviation Deviation factor Select the edge distance calculation

steps.title: Use the ellipse Region of interest...
steps.instruction: Use the ellipse Region of interest to crop the sample excluding the area with the cone beam artefact.

steps.title: Extract the region of interest to create new volume
steps.instruction: Extract the region of interest to create new volume.

steps.title: Define the material by using the...
steps.instruction: Define the material by using the automatic and advanced mode surface determination.

steps.title: In the area of failure crop out 4 mm
steps.instruction: In the area of failure crop out 4 mm

steps.title: Denoise using the non local mean...
steps.instruction: Denoise using the non local mean filter using the smothing factor 2

steps.title: Define the material by usinng surface determination
steps.instruction: Define the material by usinng surface determination. Use the automatic and advanced mode.

steps.title: Sort by minimum edge distance to...
steps.instruction: Sort by minimum edge distance to clearly define the potential crack intiating pores closest to the surface. 3D rotation video_1.wmv 3D rotation video_2.wmv

steps.title: The data is saved including the...
steps.instruction: The data is saved including the filtered data set, as a image stack (tiff). These can be viewed manually without special software. The analyzed volume can be opened in free myVGL software.
